top_signals.title: West Ham facing uncertain future after Premier League relegation
top_signals.summary: Fans' anger on Sunday was directed at the ownership, whose mismanagement has seen the club spurn the chance to establish itself in ​the ​top flight.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
